title: Indulgent Ukrainian Potatoes Bowl
description: Floral, creamy brunch‑mood dish featuring new potatoes and kombu‑cold‑extract, plant‑based friendly and packed with fresh dill.
instructions: Wash and cube the new potatoes.
In a saucepan, heat the almond milk with kombu cold extract until warm but not boiling.
Add the potatoes and simmer for 12 minutes until tender.
Drain the potatoes and return them to the pan.
Stir in olive oil, nutritional yeast, garlic, dill, lemon zest, salt, and pepper.
Cook on low for 3 minutes, stirring frequently, until sauce coats the potatoes.
Serve the creamy potatoes in bowls, optionally drizzle with a splash of plant‑based butter.
Garnish with extra dill and lemon zest for a bright finish.
Enjoy the floral, creamy brunch‑style dish.
Serve with fresh rye bread or a side salad.
